nodes.name: Schedule: Every 6h
nodes.notes:
Every 6h at 07:00/13:00/19:00/01:00.
Fetches 7 RSS feeds, ~80% filtered before LLM.

parameters.jsCode:
// RSS feed sources - verified working (last checked 2026-07-18)
// job_type: 'employment' = Anstellung | 'freelance' = Gewerbe/Projekt

const FEEDS = [
  { url: 'https://remotive.com/remote-jobs/feed?category=software-dev&search=python',             label: 'remotive-python',     job_type: 'employment' },
  { url: 'https://remotive.com/remote-jobs/feed?category=software-dev&search=n8n',               label: 'remotive-n8n',        job_type: 'employment' },
  { url: 'https://remotive.com/remote-jobs/feed?category=software-dev&search=ai+automation',     label: 'remotive-ai-auto',    job_type: 'employment' },
  { url: 'https://remotive.com/remote-jobs/feed?category=devops-sysadmin',                       label: 'remotive-devops',     job_type: 'employment' },
  { url: 'https://remotive.com/remote-jobs/feed?category=data',                                  label: 'remotive-data',       job_type: 'employment' },
  { url: 'https://remotive.com/remote-jobs/feed?category=software-dev&location=germany',         label: 'remotive-germany',    job_type: 'employment' },
  { url: 'https://remoteok.com/remote-python-jobs.rss',                                          label: 'remoteok-python',     job_type: 'employment' },
  { url: 'https://remoteok.com/remote-ai-jobs.rss',                                              label: 'remoteok-ai',         job_type: 'employment' },
  { url: 'https://remoteok.com/remote-devops-jobs.rss',                                          label: 'remoteok-devops',     job_type: 'employment' },
  { url: 'https://remoteok.com/remote-machine-learning-jobs.rss',                                label: 'remoteok-ml',         job_type: 'employment' },
  { url: 'https://hnrss.org/jobs',                                                               label: 'hn-jobs',             job_type: 'employment' },
  { url: 'https://berlinstartupjobs.com/feed/',                                                  label: 'berlin-startup',      job_type: 'employment' },
  { url: 'https://jobicy.com/?feed=job_feed&job_categories=data-science&job_types=full-time&search_region=europe', label: 'jobicy-data-eu',       job_type: 'employment' },
  { url: 'https://jobicy.com/?feed=job_feed&job_categories=data-science&job_types=full-time',                      label: 'jobicy-data',          job_type: 'employment' },
  { url: 'https://jobicy.com/?feed=job_feed&job_categories=software-engineering&job_types=full-time&search_region=europe', label: 'jobicy-softeng-eu', job_type: 'employment' },
  { url: 'https://jobspresso.co/feed/',                                                          label: 'jobspresso',          job_type: 'employment' },
  { url: 'https://remoteok.com/remote-dev-jobs.rss',                                             label: 'remoteok-dev',        job_type: 'freelance' },
  { url: 'https://remoteok.com/remote-backend-jobs.rss',                                         label: 'remoteok-backend',    job_type: 'freelance' },
  { url: 'https://weworkremotely.com/categories/remote-programming-jobs.rss',                    label: 'wwr-programming',     job_type: 'freelance' },
  { url: 'https://weworkremotely.com/categories/remote-back-end-programming-jobs.rss',           label: 'wwr-backend',         job_type: 'freelance' },
  { url: 'https://weworkremotely.com/categories/remote-devops-sysadmin-jobs.rss',                label: 'wwr-devops',          job_type: 'freelance' },
  { url: 'https://remotive.com/remote-jobs/feed?category=software-dev&search=contract',          label: 'remotive-contract',   job_type: 'freelance' },
];

return FEEDS.map(f => ({ json: f }));

nodes.name: RSS Feed List
nodes.notes:
16 feeds total: 12 employment + 4 freelance.
All URLs verified working 2026-06-24.

nodes.name: HTTP: Fetch RSS Feed
nodes.notes:
Direct HTTP - no API key, no cost.
User-Agent prevents 403 on some feeds.

nodes.name: Parse RSS Items
nodes.notes:
Splits XML into individual items.
Filters items older than 72h.
Outputs: title, link, description, pubDate, label, job_type.

nodes.name: Keyword Filter
nodes.notes:
Drops items without Python/AI/n8n keywords.
Saves ~80% of LLM API calls.

nodes.name: Normalize Item
nodes.notes:
Builds normalized_input.
Adds filter_context based on job_type.

parameters.jsCode:
const ni = $('Normalize Item').item.json.normalized_input;
return [{ json: { normalized_input: ni, hard_injection_detected: 'no' } }];

nodes.name: Skip Security Checks
nodes.notes: Trusted RSS sources. No domain to verify.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen/qwen3-30b-a3b-instruct-2507', max_tokens: 2048, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $env.JOBRADAR_SYSTEM_PROMPT }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify($json.normalized_input) }] }) }}

parameters.query:
WITH
co AS (
  INSERT INTO companies (company_id, name, meta)
  VALUES ({{ $json.db.company_id_sql }}, {{ $json.db.company_name_sql }}, '{}')
  ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, company_id) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id
),
em AS (
  INSERT INTO employers (employer_id, company_id, name)
  SELECT {{ $json.db.employer_id_sql }}, {{ $json.db.company_id_sql }}, {{ $json.db.employer_name_sql }}
  WHERE  {{ $json.db.employer_id_sql }} IS NOT NULL
  ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, employer_id) DO UPDATE SET
    name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.name, employers.name), updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id
),
j AS (
  INSERT INTO jobs (
    job_id_fuzzy, company_id, employer_id, job_title, location, seniority,
    work_mode, work_mode_raw, working_hours,
    salary_currency, salary_min, salary_max, salary_period,
    tech_stack, key_requirements,
    current_stage, priority, priority_level,
    interview_date, response_deadline, application_deadline,
    has_had_call, call_count, last_call_date,
    source_url, source_input, summary, job_type
  ) VALUES (
    {{ $json.db.job_id_fuzzy_sql }}, {{ $json.db.company_id_sql }}, {{ $json.db.employer_id_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.job_title_sql }}, {{ $json.db.location_sql }}, {{ $json.db.seniority_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.work_mode_sql }}, {{ $json.db.work_mode_raw_sql }}, {{ $json.db.working_hours_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.salary_currency_sql }}, {{ $json.db.salary_min_sql }}, {{ $json.db.salary_max_sql }}, {{ $json.db.salary_period_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.tech_stack_sql }}, {{ $json.db.key_requirements_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.current_stage_sql }}, {{ $json.db.priority_sql }}, {{ $json.db.priority_level_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.interview_date_sql }}, {{ $json.db.response_deadline_sql }}, {{ $json.db.application_deadline_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.has_had_call_sql }}, {{ $json.db.call_count_sql }}, {{ $json.db.last_call_date_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.source_url_sql }}, {{ $json.db.source_input_sql }}, {{ $json.db.summary_sql }}, {{ $json.db.job_type_sql }}
  )
  ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, job_id_fuzzy) DO UPDATE SET
    current_stage = EXCLUDED.current_stage, priority = EXCLUDED.priority, priority_level = EXCLUDED.priority_level,
    interview_date = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.interview_date, jobs.interview_date),
    response_deadline = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.response_deadline, jobs.response_deadline),
    application_deadline = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.application_deadline, jobs.application_deadline),
    tech_stack = CASE WHEN array_length(EXCLUDED.tech_stack,1)>0 THEN EXCLUDED.tech_stack ELSE jobs.tech_stack END,
    source_url = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.source_url, jobs.source_url),
    summary = EXCLUDED.summary, job_type = EXCLUDED.job_type, updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id, job_id_fuzzy, current_stage::text, priority::text, summary, interview_date
),
ev AS (
  INSERT INTO job_events (
    job_id, job_thread_key, job_id_fuzzy, input_source, source_detail,
    category, is_job_related, action, stage, priority, priority_level,
    interview_date, response_deadline, application_deadline,
    call_platform, call_platform_raw, raw_text, parsed_json,
    sender_risk_level, sender_risk_signals
  )
  SELECT (SELECT id FROM j), {{ $json.db.job_thread_key_sql }}, {{ $json.db.job_id_fuzzy_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.source_input_sql }}, 'rss',
    {{ $json.db.category_sql }}, {{ $json.db.is_job_related_sql }}, {{ $json.db.action_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.current_stage_sql }}, {{ $json.db.priority_sql }}, {{ $json.db.priority_level_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.interview_date_sql }}, {{ $json.db.response_deadline_sql }}, {{ $json.db.application_deadline_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.call_platform_sql }}, {{ $json.db.call_platform_raw_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.raw_text_sql }}, {{ $json.db.parsed_json_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.sender_risk_level_sql }}, {{ $json.db.sender_risk_signals_sql }}
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT (SELECT id FROM j) AS job_id, (SELECT job_id_fuzzy FROM j) AS job_id_fuzzy,
       (SELECT current_stage FROM j) AS stage, (SELECT priority FROM j) AS priority,
       (SELECT summary FROM j) AS summary, (SELECT interview_date FROM j) AS interview_date,
       (SELECT id FROM ev) AS event_id;

nodes.name: DB: Write All
nodes.notes:
Idempotent upsert on job_id_fuzzy.
source_detail='rss' in job_events for audit.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.job_type === 'freelance' ? parseInt($env.TELEGRAM_GEWERBE_CHAT_ID) : parseInt($env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID), parse_mode: 'HTML', text: [ ($json.job_type==='freelance' ? '??' : '??') + ' [RSS] ' + ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.company_name || '?') + '', ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.job_title || '-'), '', 'Stage: ' + ($json.stage||'discovered') + ' Priority: ' + ($json.priority||'?') + '', 'Feed: ' + ((($('Normalize Item').item.json.normalized_input.raw_meta)||{}).label||'?'), '', ($json.summary || '') ].join('\n'), disable_web_page_preview: true }) }}

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ parent: { database_id: '387e9707-d991-8182-ab7c-d83e9d147dba' }, properties: { 'Stelle': { title: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.job_title || 'Unbekannt').slice(0,100) } }] }, 'Unternehmen': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.company_name || '').slice(0,200) } }] }, 'Gehalt': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.salary_range || '').slice(0,200) } }] }, 'Standort': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.location || '').slice(0,200) } }] }, 'Link': { url: $('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.source_url || null }, 'Notizen': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.summary || '').slice(0,2000) } }] }, 'Status': { select: { name: 'Neu' } } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ parent: { database_id: 'afdb636cbdec4acba678c95df96b01e1' }, properties: { 'Projekt': { title: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.job_title || 'Unbekannt').slice(0,100) } }] }, 'Kunde': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.company_name || '').slice(0,200) } }] }, 'Typ': { select: { name: 'Freelance' } }, 'Budget': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.salary_range || '').slice(0,200) } }] }, 'Standort': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.location || '').slice(0,200) } }] }, 'Link': { url: $('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.source_url || null }, 'Notizen': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.summary || '').slice(0,2000) } }] }, 'Status': { select: { name: 'Neu' } }, 'Quelle': { select: { name: 'RSS' } } } }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET contact_email = {{ $('Prepare DB Params').item.json.db.contact_email_sql }} WHERE id = '{{ $json.job_id }}'::uuid AND contact_email IS NULL;
